original_final_question: Find the Iowa counties that met the following criteria in 2019: a December unemployment rate above 2.9%, more than 12% of their motor-fuel sales coming from biofuels, and residents collectively received more than $4 billion in income. Compare the 2020 census populations of their county seats, then report the July 2019 population of the county with the most populous county seat. Only return the population number. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

reasoning: Node 1: Filter rows where `AREA TYPE` equals `County`, `YEAR` equals `2019`, `MONTH` equals `December`, `SEASONALLY ADJUSTED` equals `0`, and `UNEMPLOYMENT RATE` is greater than `2.9`, sort by `UNEMPLOYMENT RATE` descending, compute the full qualifying set, and keep a 10-item readable slice that retains `Scott County` and `Black Hawk County`.

Node 2: Filter rows where `Calendar Year` equals `2019` and `Biofuel Distribution Percentage` is greater than `12`, sort by `Biofuel Distribution Percentage` descending, compute the full qualifying set, and keep a 10-item readable slice that retains `Scott` and `Black Hawk`.
Node 3: Filter rows where `Variable` equals `Personal income`, the year in `Date` equals `2019`, and `Value` is greater than `4000000`, sort by `Value` descending, and keep `Name`.
Hop result: semantically intersect the retained county answers from nodes 1-3 to get Black Hawk County and Scott County.
Node 4: Waterloo is the county seat of Black Hawk County.
Node 5: Davenport is the county seat of Scott County.
Node 6: Waterloo had a 2020 census population of 67314.
Node 7: Davenport had a 2020 census population of 101724.
Hop result: compare <node_6 answer> and <node_7 answer> -> Scott County
Node 8: Filter rows where `County` equals `Scott County` and `Year` equals `July 01 2019`, then return `Population`.
